hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git status --short | grep -q . && git commit -m "auto: $(date +%H:%M) agent code changes" 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf \.|git push --force|drop table|DELETE FROM"; then echo "Blocked: potentially destructive command requires explicit confirmation" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
